subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant who art attracted to the Kingdom of God and art announcing the glad-tidings of the Beauty of the countenance of Baha in those regions! Verily, I address to thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الامه المنجذبه الی ملکوت الله المبشره بالجمال الابهی فی تلک الانحاء انی
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @entry by troops, @growth of the Cause
